Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.server.config.repository
Server Configuration Application
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json used by org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Class
    Description
    JsonParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonParser.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
    Class
    Description
    JsonMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to JsonClassMeta and JsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    JsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
    JsonSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSerializer.
    JsonSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing JSON.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
    Class
    Description
    Json
    Annotation for specifying various JSON options for the JSON serializers and parsers.
    JsonAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonApply
    Dynamically applies a @Json annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    JsonApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the JSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Json annotation on the bean property.
    JsonClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the JSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Json annotation on the class.
    JsonConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in JsonSerializer and JsonParser.
    JsonMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to JsonClassMeta and JsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    JsonParser
    Parses any valid RFC 8259 JSON text into a POJO model.
    JsonParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonParser.
    JsonParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metadata to HTTP responses as JSON-Schema.
    JsonSchemaSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSchemaSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSchemaSerializer.
    JsonSchemaSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
    JsonSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed JsonSerializer.create() / JsonSerializer.copy() path.
    JsonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSerializer.
    JsonSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    JsonTokenReader.Settings
    Cursor-level settings honored by JsonTokenReader.
    JsonTokenWriter
    Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSON format.
    JsonTokenWriter.Settings
    Output-formatting settings honored by JsonTokenWriter.
    JsonWriter
    Specialized writer for serializing JSON.
